roles.name: Sanqing Architect of the Dao
roles.description: Master of the Three Pure Ones' wisdom — architects the over-arching celestial solution and watches over its harmony.

roles.name: Marshal of the Heavenly Host
roles.description: Marshals the immortal warriors of delivery, holds the timeline, and answers to the Jade Emperor.

roles.name: Keeper of the Jade Registry
roles.description: Steward of records, layouts, fields and permission sets in the celestial ledgers.

roles.name: Master Smith of the Furnace
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and platform features in Laojun's eight-trigram crucible.

roles.name: Star Lord of the Western Heaven
roles.description: Captain over all senior Salesforce craft — sets standards and guides the senior immortals.

roles.name: Veteran Cloud-Walking Immortal
roles.description: Patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced cultivation craft.

roles.name: Junior Cloud-Walking Disciple
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the realm under the senior immortal's eye.

roles.name: Architect of the Magpie Bridge
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond the Milky Way.

roles.name: Builder of the Magpie Bridge
roles.description: Lays the planks of API, middleware, and event flows under the Bridge Architect's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Bridge Crow
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the celestial patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Medicine Spirit of Penglai
roles.description: Tends the wounded scripts and the weary stack — finds the maladies in the build before they reach the Emperor.

roles.name: Herald of the Phoenix Banner
roles.description: Lifts the banner and the bronze bell for product and message — leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Strategist of the Bagua Drum
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the celestial drum to gather and convert.

roles.name: Banner-Bearer of the Vermilion Bird
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the four cardinal kingdoms — content, creative, and daily ritual.

roles.name: Scribe of the Veritable Records
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal Customer and the immortal craft of design.

roles.name: Sage Daoshi of the Inner Alchemy
roles.description: Legendary cultivation-class developer — handles the deepest, most senior platform work.

roles.name: Newly-Ascended Xian
roles.description: Fresh from mortal cultivation — picks up configuration and discovery work under senior guidance.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Jade Emperor's Court — Heavenly Bureau Modernization

children.name: Pillar of the South Heaven Gate

realms.projectName: Eight Immortals — Crossing the Sea Logistics Platform
Underworld & Folk Deities — Diyu Records Migration

jade-emperor-court.themedRole: Star Lord of the Western Heaven

eight-immortals.themedRole: Sage Daoshi of the Inner Alchemy

dragons-and-creators.themedRole: Star Lord of the Western Heaven

underworld-and-folk-deities.themedRole: Sage Daoshi of the Inner Alchemy

jade-emperor-court.name: Convene the Heavenly Court
jade-emperor-court.description: Discovery sign-off — bells rung at the South Heaven Gate.

jade-emperor-court.name: Forge the Ruyi Jingu Bang
jade-emperor-court.description: Build kickoff: the Monkey King's staff reforged for the road ahead.

jade-emperor-court.name: Audience at Lingxiao Hall
jade-emperor-court.description: Mid-project gate: stewardship review with the Jade Emperor's council.

jade-emperor-court.name: Peach Banquet Phase Invoice
jade-emperor-court.description: Phase invoice trigger: feast of immortal peaches served.

jade-emperor-court.name: Coronation of Order
jade-emperor-court.description: Go-Live: the celestial bureaucracy returns to harmony.

jade-emperor-court.name: Hand-off to Wangmu
jade-emperor-court.description: Hyper-care close: stewardship passed to the Queen Mother.

eight-immortals.name: Gathering at Penglai
eight-immortals.description: Project kickoff: the Eight assemble on the immortal isle.

eight-immortals.name: Cross the Eastern Sea
eight-immortals.description: Build phase: each immortal deploys their magic treasure.

eight-immortals.name: Dragon King's Acceptance
eight-immortals.description: UAT gate: peace treaty with the Dragon King of the East Sea.

eight-immortals.name: Festival of Magu
eight-immortals.description: Phase invoice: longevity festival sponsorship cleared.

eight-immortals.name: Return to Penglai
eight-immortals.description: Go-Live: the immortals return triumphant with the new platform.

eight-immortals.name: Eternal Banquet Hand-off
eight-immortals.description: Hyper-care close: the immortal banquet resumes.

dragons-and-creators.name: Pangu's First Stroke
dragons-and-creators.description: Discovery: heaven and earth separated, scope finalized.

dragons-and-creators.name: Nüwa Patches the Sky
dragons-and-creators.description: Build: the five-coloured stones forged into the platform.

dragons-and-creators.name: Yellow Emperor's Audit
dragons-and-creators.description: Solution review with Huangdi himself at Mount Kunlun.

dragons-and-creators.name: Yinglong Calls the Rain
dragons-and-creators.description: Phase invoice trigger: the rain-bringer signs the bill.

dragons-and-creators.name: Four Symbols Activation
dragons-and-creators.description: Go-Live: Azure Dragon, White Tiger, Vermilion Bird, Black Tortoise stand watch.

dragons-and-creators.name: Bagua Final Reckoning
dragons-and-creators.description: Project close: the trigrams aligned and handed to Fuxi.

underworld-and-folk-deities.name: Council of the Ten Kings
underworld-and-folk-deities.description: Kickoff council in the First Court of Diyu.

underworld-and-folk-deities.name: Drink Meng Po's Soup
underworld-and-folk-deities.description: Discovery close: prior-state forgotten, future-state mapped.

underworld-and-folk-deities.name: Weave the Karma Ledger
underworld-and-folk-deities.description: Build: dashboards woven from the threads of merit and demerit.

underworld-and-folk-deities.name: Mazu's Coastal Acceptance
underworld-and-folk-deities.description: UAT acceptance: blessings from the sea goddess at every port.

underworld-and-folk-deities.name: Chang'e Lunar Go-Live
underworld-and-folk-deities.description: Go-Live + handoff: the moon goddess illuminates the new system.

underworld-and-folk-deities.name: Final Recompense at Naihe Bridge
underworld-and-folk-deities.description: Final invoice: tally settled before the bridge of forgetfulness.

Sun Wukong.notes: Trapped under Five Elements Mountain — annual penance week.

Zhu Bajie.notes: Gao Village family visit — feast schedule conflict.

Nezha.notes: Wind-Fire Wheels at the celestial repair shop.

Erlang Shen.notes: Hunting expedition with the Howling Celestial Dog.

Magu.notes: Hosting the Longevity Festival — every sixty years.

Tieguai Li.notes: Iron crutch repair at the celestial smithy.

Nüwa.notes: Sky-patching maintenance — Mount Buzhou collapse follow-up.

Shennong.notes: Tasting one hundred herbs — recovery week.

Huangdi the Yellow Emperor.notes: Audience with the Yellow River dragons.

Houyi the Archer.notes: Annual sun-shooting practice — nine remaining suns.

Mazu the Sea Goddess.notes: Coastal pilgrimage — blessing the fishing fleets.

Meng Po.notes: Soup cauldron deep-clean and herb restock.
